next_steps: Thyroid function tests (TSH, free T4, free T3)
Thyroid ultrasound with Doppler flow evaluation
Erythrocyte sedimentation rate (ESR) and C-reactive protein (CRP) trending
Blood cultures (repeat) and peripheral blood smear
Discontinue antibiotics (pending suspected diagnosis of inflammatory thyroiditis)
Consider fine-needle aspiration of the thyroid nodule if ultrasound suggests suspicious features

differential_diagnoses: Thyrotoxicosis (due to subacute thyroiditis or silent thyroiditis)
next_steps: Obtain thyroid function tests (TSH, free T4, free T3)
Perform thyroid ultrasound with Doppler flow evaluation
Order thyroid peroxidase (TPO) antibodies and thyroglobulin levels
Check procalcitonin level to evaluate for occult bacterial infection
Monitor thyroid-specific inflammatory markers and thyroid uptake scan if indicated by laboratory results
